articles.description: Despite the Middle East war and rising geopolitical tensions, gold prices have fallen, defying their safe-haven appeal. This counterintuitive trend is attributed to a broad risk-off sentiment, a strong US dollar, and profit-booking after earlier rallies. Experts suggest this is a short-term adjustment, with long-term fundamentals still supporting precious metals.

articles.title: Neighbourhood clinics on crutches
articles.description: Across Hyderabad’s crowded localities, Urban Primary Health Centres serve as the first point of contact for thousands seeking everyday medical care. Often housed in ageing buildings and run by small teams of doctors, nurses and community health workers, these clinics shoulder much of the city’s routine healthcare burden. But while the city gains prominence for its corporate hospitals and medical tourism, UPHCs continue to function with limited infrastructure and growing patient loads, writes Siddharth Kumar Singh

dailyNews.title: Bitcoin rebounds toward $72K as US Treasury comments ease oil inflation concerns
dailyNews.description: Bitcoin surged towards $72,000 after U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent addressed market concerns.  Cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum saw significant gains.  Major altcoins also experienced strong upward movement.  This rally added billions to the crypto market cap.  Investors are watching upcoming Federal Reserve meetings and economic data for further direction.  The market sentiment is improving despite some caution.

dailyNews.title: Explained: Why traders aren’t holding on to gold since Middle East war despite safe haven appeal
dailyNews.description: Despite the Middle East war and rising geopolitical tensions, gold prices have fallen, defying their safe-haven appeal. This counterintuitive trend is attributed to a broad risk-off sentiment, a strong US dollar, and profit-booking after earlier rallies. Experts suggest this is a short-term adjustment, with long-term fundamentals still supporting precious metals.

dailyNews.title: Miami Beach loosens spring break restrictions, aims to draw calmer crowds
dailyNews.description: For the first time in two years, the city of Miami Beach is loosening its spring break restrictions as it looks to attract more families and health-conscious tourists.

dailyNews.title: Long Island teen who vanished after trip to NYC found dead in Brooklyn waters
dailyNews.description: Long Island teen Thomas Medlin, who reportedly went to meet someone from Roblox, was found dead in Brooklyn waters after vanishing from Manhattan Bridge.

dailyNews.title: Who is Ayman Mohamad Ghazali? Lebanese-born American accused in Jewish synagogue attack
dailyNews.description: Suspect allegedly rammed vehicle into Michigan synagogue, exchanged gunfire with security before being killed. Multiple injured in West Bloomfield.

dailyNews.title: California shootings leave 2 deputies, utility worker injured; suspect also shot: officials
dailyNews.description: Two El Dorado sheriff's deputies and a Pacific Gas and Electric Co. worker were wounded in California shootings, with the suspect in both incidents also shot.

dailyNews.title: Sen Schmitt reups push for expanding denaturalization after recent acts of violence by naturalized citizens
dailyNews.description: Sen. Eric Schmitt is pushing his SCAM Act to expand denaturalization after alleged attacks by naturalized citizens at Michigan synagogue and Virginia university.

dailyNews.title: Doctor denies knowing about rampant LA-area Medicare fraud using his provider number
dailyNews.description: Rampant Medicare fraud schemes in Los Angeles allegedly bilk taxpayers for billions through fake home health agencies and ghost patients across the city.

dailyNews.title: Mamdani touts landmark court victory against repeat offender landlord in housing enforcement push
dailyNews.description: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani unveils landmark legal victory in housing crisis fight, securing maximum penalties against repeat offender landlord in groundbreaking case.

dailyNews.description: Australian authorities apologize after two foster children lived with a transgender convicted triple killer for months, calling the situation "entirely unacceptable" and "terrible."

dailyNews.title: How Trump’s Election Lie Could Affect 2026 Midterms
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is putting the weight of the federal government behind his false claims about the 2020 election in order to investigate key swing states ahead of the midterms. Nick Corasaniti, a New York Times reporter focusing on elections, homes in on the states that have become the prime targets and why.

dailyNews.title: Trump Endorses Jake Paul, Who Isn't Running for Office
dailyNews.description: The president called Mr. Paul, a boxer and provocative influencer, a “great guy” and predicted that he would run for an elected position.

dailyNews.title: Iran war disrupts global oil trade as Trump administration prepares to escort ships
dailyNews.description: Iran's relentless attacks on Gulf states and infrastructure appear to be overshadowing interventions by the U.S. and its allies aimed at easing energy prices.

dailyNews.title: U.S. launches new investigations into 60 countries as it fights to restore tariffs
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has launched investigations into dozens of countries accused of failing to crack down on forced labor, flexing a law that lets the federal government impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration allows purchase of Russian oil already at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is temporarily allowing the purchase of Russian oil that's already at sea, in the Trump administration's latest move to loosen sanctions on Russia's oil industry as the world grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Experts, reports on the Strait of Hormuz and gas prices
dailyNews.description: Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz was mostly stopped amid the war in Iran on Thursday, which contributed to rising oil prices. The waterway typically carries around 20% of the world's supply of oil. On Wednesday, President Trump ordered the release of 172 million barrels of oil from emergency reserves. In a statement attributed to Iran's new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, he said Iran should keep putting pressure on the critical chokepoint.

dailyNews.title: Cuba to release 51 people from prison in surprise move amid Trump pressure
dailyNews.description: Cuba's government says it will release 51 people from prisons, in an unexpected move that comes as the Trump administration puts immense pressure on the country.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariffs: Martin Heinrich bill would give families tax rebate for higher import costs
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Housing affordability bill clears Senate as investor ban creates headaches
dailyNews.description: The Senate passed the bill 89-10, but House lawmakers say more changes are needed before it could go to President Donald Trump's desk.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed SAVE America Act will get a Senate vote next week, Thune says
dailyNews.description: Advocates of the voter-ID bill have pressed the Senate for months to call a vote on the controversial legislation.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
